name: LIPOMATOUS HYPERTROPHY OF INTERATRIAL SEPTUM
definition: LHIAS = excessive deposition of brown fat in interatrial septum

demographics.Histo: unencapsulated infiltration of adipocytes (brown fat) between atrial muscle cells, NOT

dominant_finding: fatty mass of dumbbell shape ← sparing of fossa ovalis
distribution: increase in mediastinal and epicardial fat
discriminating_features: fatty mass of dumbbell shape ← sparing of fossa ovalis
increase in mediastinal and epicardial fat
± focally increased FDG activity = mean SUV of 1.84 (range, 0.48-3.48) ← metabolically active

general: fatty mass of dumbbell shape ← sparing of fossa ovalis
increase in mediastinal and epicardial fat
± focally increased FDG activity = mean SUV of 1.84 (range, 0.48-3.48) ← metabolically active
